dropzone: Drag an image here, or click to choose
beforeUnload: An upload is still in progress. Leave this page anyway?

errors.oversize: This file is too large. Please choose a smaller image.
errors.wrong_mime: Unsupported file type. Use a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
errors.quota_exceeded: Storage limit reached. Free up space and try again.
errors.network: Upload failed due to a network error. Please try again.
errors.mime_mismatch: The file content does not match an allowed image type.
errors.sign_failed: Could not start the upload. Please try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong during the upload.

avatar.title: Profile photo
avatar.description: Upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image up to 5 MB. Square images look best.

logo.title: Organization logo
logo.description: Upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image up to 5 MB.
logo.ownerOnly: Only organization owners and admins can change the logo.
